message:
test(wave-38): add 13 pure data-type tests for observability/otel + sync/rwlock

otel: CardinalityOverflow, MetricsConfig, SamplingConfig, MetricsSnapshot,
ExportError, StdoutExporter, NullExporter, MultiExporter, InMemoryExporter
Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/Eq coverage.
Also fix pre-existing otel test compilation (private field -> accessor methods
for opentelemetry_sdk API change).

rwlock: RwLockError, TryReadError, TryWriteError Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq/Display,
RwLock Debug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
